title: Whole Shotgun Metagenomics Pipeline for Studying Human Digestive Microbiota
author: Victoria Meslier
materials: High throughput WGS sequencing as described in [1]

steps.title: Supplementary QC check was performed using CroCoDeEL tool https://github
steps.instruction: Supplementary QC check was performed using CroCoDeEL tool https://github.com/metagenopolis/CroCoDeEL

steps.title: Determination of the microbial composition of...
steps.instruction: Determination of the microbial composition of high quality samples using MSPminer [10]

steps.title: Determination of the functional potentials of...
steps.instruction: Determination of the functional potentials of high quality samples using in-house pipeline as described in [15]

description: QC validation and read mapping was performed using the parametres described in the attached document using the 10.4M gut gene catalog and the 8.4M oral gene catalog.
